validation_rules: Original artifact is immutable. Never edit the file referenced in original_artifact.
Replacement artifact must be present for corrected status.
Correction does not delete drift. Drift receipt and resolution receipt both remain in repo.
Replay must remain possible. Both artifacts must be readable and sha256 must verify.
Authority remains false. Resolution adds new artifacts only.
Field names in observed_value and corrected_value must match exactly.
resolution_status must align with presence of replacement_artifact.
